Who I Am

ABOUT ME

I'm a Data Science enthusiast pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science at Lovely Professional University, with a strong focus on Machine Learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models. I enjoy transforming raw data into meaningful insights and building intelligent systems that solve real-world problems.

My experience spans Python, Scikit-learn, Power BI, and SQL — performing data analysis, visualization, and predictive modeling. I've built projects ranging from a real-time memory allocation tracker to an interactive terrorism analytics dashboard, applying data-driven thinking to uncover patterns and support decision-making.

With a growing interest in GenAI and LLM architectures, I aim to bridge the gap between technical models and business applications — leveraging data to drive strategy, optimize processes, and deliver scalable AI-driven solutions.

PROJECTS

January 2026 · Live
MINI GITHUB — DEVOPS SCM
A mini GitHub-like system simulating real-world DevOps workflows — version control, branching, merging, and conflict resolution.

  • Managed code evolution and collaboration using Git, Python (Flask), HTML & CSS

02
March 2026
TERRORIST ATTACK ANALYSIS DASHBOARD
Analysed global terrorism data to identify trends, high-risk regions, and patterns in attack types for real-world security insights.
  • Built interactive Power BI dashboard for attack frequency, casualties, and target analysis
  • Used Power Query & Excel CSV datasets to clean, transform, and deliver actionable insights
Power BIPower QueryExcelData Analytics

03
Apr – May 2024
REAL-TIME MEMORY ALLOCATION TRACKER
Built a real-time memory tracking system to monitor usage, detect leaks, and analyse allocation and deallocation behaviour.
  • Implemented logging, monitoring, and alert mechanisms for memory pattern analysis
  • Used Python (Flask), NumPy, and Matplotlib to collect, analyse, and visualise data interactively
PythonFlaskNumPyMatplotlib
